zh.Great Musgrave, Westmorland, England: 英國英格蘭維斯特莫藍德格亞特 馬斯格雷夫
zh.lifeSummary: Mrs. Wido De Holebec於大約1148年出生在英國維斯特莫藍德。她於大約1169年與Wido de Holebec在英國維斯特莫藍德結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Holebec
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Czech and Slovak Bohdan.
Czech and Slovak: derivative of   Holub   ‘dove’.

variants.name: Holub
meanings: Czech, Slovak, Ukrainian, Rusyn, Belorussian, and Jewish (eastern Ashkenazic): from Czech, Slovak, Ukrainian, Rusyn, and Belorussian holub ‘dove’, hence a nickname for a mild-mannered or peace-loving person or a metonymic occupational name for someone who bred or looked after doves, which were reared as egg-layers and for food in the Middle Ages. As a Jewish name it is mainly artificial. The Russian-oriented transliteration of the Ukrainian and Belorussian surname is Golub .

nameMeanings.name: Wido
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Italian: from the personal name Nido, perhaps from Latin nidus ‘nest’ or from the ancient Germanic personal name Nid.
Spanish (Asturias): nickname or topographic name from nido ‘nest’, from Latin nidus.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: Mrs. Wido De Holebec was born about 1148, in Westmorland, England. She married Wido de Holebec about 1169, in Westmorland, England. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter.

ko.lifeSummary: Mrs. Wido De Holebec(은)는 대략 1148년 영국 웨스트모를랜드에서 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1169년 영국 웨스트모를랜드에서 Wido de Holebec(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다.
